title: Mr Crimbo Wooden Christmas Candle Holder Bar Rustic Logs Pine Branches Pine Cones Stars Baubles Silver Grey Tealight Votive Table Centrepiece
features: Suitable for tealights and votive candles
Wooden Bar Candle Holder Christmas Decoration
40cm long rustic design with grey logs
Decorated with pine cones, baubles, stars and green foliage
Includes 4 removable silver glass candle holders
description: Create a charming focal point for your Christmas decorations with this rustic style Wooden Candle Holder. The 40cm long bar shape festive decoration has 4 removable silver glass candle holders suitable for 4cm tealights and votive candles. Decorated with grey logs, pine cones, silver baubles, white stars and green foliage, this decoration is perfect for displaying on a coffee table, mantlepiece or as a centrepiece for your Christmas dinner table. Material: Wood, glass and plastic. Size: W40 x H8 x D13cm. Suitable for tealights, and votive candles up to 4cm diameter. Please note: candles are not included. For indoor use only
